step_rationale: Marker of active fibrinolysis; plasmin consumption indicates ongoing thrombus degradation.
mechanism: Plasmin-inhibitor complex marks active fibrinolysis and thrombus remodeling in myocardial infarction.

references.title: [Predictive value of four items of new thrombus markers combined with conventional coagulation tests for thrombosis in antiphospholipid syndrome].
references.journal: Beijing da xue xue bao. Yi xue ban = Journal of Peking University. Health sciences

references.title: Relationship between intracoronary thrombolysis and fibrino-coagulation--special reference to TAT/PIC and FPA/PIC.
